name: strata-mixer
description: Strata Mixer v1.2 — программа для уникализации и редактирования видео

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite --port 5180" "wait-on http://localhost:5180 && cross-env STRATA_SKIP_UPDATE_CHECK=1 VITE_DEV_PORT=5180 electron ."
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run prepare-ffmpeg && electron-packager . StrataMixer_1_2 --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=release --overwrite --icon=assets/strata_mixer_1_1d.ico --prune=true
scripts.package:win: npm run build && npm run prepare-ffmpeg && electron-packager . StrataMixer_1_2 --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=release --overwrite --icon=assets/strata_mixer_1_1d.ico --prune=true
scripts.package:mac-arm64: npm run build && npm run prepare-ffmpeg && electron-packager . StrataMixer_1_2 --platform=darwin --arch=arm64 --out=release-mac --overwrite --icon=assets/strata_mixer_1_1d.icns --prune=true
scripts.package:mac-x64: npm run build && npm run prepare-ffmpeg && electron-packager . StrataMixer_1_2 --platform=darwin --arch=x64 --out=release-mac --overwrite --icon=assets/strata_mixer_1_1d.icns --prune=true
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run prepare-ffmpeg && electron-builder --win
